top_signals.title: Oil Refiners Are Cashing In on a Market That Won’t Stay Broken
top_signals.summary: Oil refiners have stumbled into one of the best profit environments in years. Crude prices have fallen back to where they traded before the Iran war erupted. But gasoline, diesel, and jet fuel remain stubbornly expensive. That combination has pushed refining margins to extraordinary levels, giving refiners a windfall that few expected just weeks after the Strait of Hormuz reopened. The benchmark U.S. 3-2-1 crack spread—a closely watched measure of refining profitability—recently climbed above $60 per barrel, the highest level on record.…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Fed Is Behind The Curve as Tech Economy Booms, TS Lombard Says
top_signals.summary: The Federal Reserve should start tightening policy to constrain the artificial intelligence boom gripping the US, TS Lombard Chief Economist Freya Beamish said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: US launches air strikes as Iran targets tankers with cruise missiles
top_signals.summary: Donald Trump demands 20% fee on cargoes passing through Strait of Hormuz
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Helsing raises $1.8 billion in Europe’s biggest defense-startup round
top_signals.summary: Defense technology has been one of the fastest-growing areas of venture capital funding on the back of rising military budgets, and in Europe especially.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: JPMorgan reports record profits on blockbuster trading haul
top_signals.summary: Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan, Bank of America, Citigroup and Wells Fargo all have results on Tuesday
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin's BIP-110 sparked a fight over who gets to decide the future of Bitcoin
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Retail-trader 'bottleneck bros' eyeing AI supply chain can't wait for SK Hynix options
top_signals.summary: For many of those retail tech traders, SK Hynix's memory business reminds them of Micron – the paragon of the supply-chain bottleneck thesis.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: 'Nobody underwrote for that': Private credit faces a key test as higher rates squeeze borrowers
top_signals.summary: Private credit is facing a new pressure point from elevated rates, which could hit under-pressure borrowers.
